name: Dynamic Severity Assessment
description: Performs AI-based dynamic severity scoring for incoming incidents and routes them to the appropriate response track. A code node gathers contextual data including asset criticality, affected user count, and threat intelligence matches. Riggs AI then generates a severity score with weighted factors. Critical incidents are immediately escalated with a PagerDuty page and war room creation. High incidents get a P2 ticket and SOC lead notification. Medium and low incidents are logged with appropriate priority for standard handling.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets with AI-assessed priority for all severity tiers

required_integrations.name: PagerDuty
required_integrations.reason: Page on-call engineer for critical-severity incidents

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Create war rooms for critical incidents and notify SOC leads for high incidents

config.description: Triggers on any incoming alert to perform dynamic AI-based severity assessment

config.query: SELECT a.criticality, a.business_unit, a.data_classification FROM assets a WHERE a.hostname = '{{trigger_1.alert.hostname}}' OR a.ip_address = '{{trigger_1.alert.source_ip}}'
config.description: Retrieve asset criticality, business unit, and data classification to weight the severity score

config.additional_instructions: Calculate a dynamic severity score considering: alert type, asset criticality, number of affected systems, threat intel matches, and time of day. Output a final severity tier: critical, high, medium, or low.
config.description: AI-powered severity scoring using weighted factors including asset context, threat intel, and impact scope
Check if the dynamic severity assessment resulted in a critical rating

parameters.title: CRITICAL: {{trigger_1.alert.title}} (AI Score: Critical)

config.description: Page the on-call engineer via PagerDuty for a critical-rated incident
Create a dedicated war room channel for coordinated critical incident response
Critical severity path complete — on-call paged and war room created
Check if the dynamic severity assessment resulted in a high rating

data.label: Create P2 Ticket and Notify SOC Lead

config.description: Create a P2 incident ticket for a high-severity rated incident
Notify the SOC lead about the high-severity incident via Slack
High severity path complete — P2 ticket created and SOC lead notified
Create a standard priority ticket for medium or low severity incidents
Standard severity path complete — P3 ticket created for routine handling
